scripts.build:wasm: cd ../../jazz-wasm && RUSTFLAGS='--cfg getrandom_backend="wasm_js" --cfg web_sys_unstable_apis' wasm-pack build --target web --release --out-dir pkg-web
scripts.smoke: npm run build && npm run smoke:built
scripts.demo:bundle: npm run build:wasm && npm run check && npm run build
scripts.demo: npm run demo:bundle && npm run smoke:built
